Usage: gs branch (b) comment (cmt) list (ls) [flags]

List comments on a change request

Lists comments on the change request associated with the current branch.
Use --branch to target a different branch.

Staged comments that have not yet been submitted are shown with an 'sc-N'
prefix.

Use --staged to show only staged comments. Use --unresolved to show only
unresolved comments.

With --json, prints output to stdout as a stream of JSON objects.

Flags:
  -b, --branch=BRANCH    Branch to list comments for. Defaults to current
                         branch.
      --staged           Show only staged comments.
      --unresolved       Show only unresolved comments.
      --json             Write to stdout as a stream of JSON objects.

Global Flags:
  -h, --help           Show help for the command
      --version        Print version information and quit
  -v, --verbose        Enable verbose output ($GIT_SPICE_VERBOSE)
  -C, --dir=DIR        Change to DIR before doing anything
      --[no-]prompt    Whether to prompt for missing information
